title: Papyrus Oxyrhynchus 5575
source_edition: Fish, Wallace & Holmes 2023, *The Oxyrhynchus Papyri* LXXXVII (Egypt Exploration Society).
date_of_composition: Manuscript late 2nd or early 3rd century CE.
scope_note: A sayings fragment interweaving Mt 6:25–26, Lk 12:22–24, and Thomas Logion 27. Holmes (the editor) suggests it may witness a sayings-source behind both canonical Q and Thomas — making it a potentially significant textual witness if so.
license_note: Source-text transcription is © 2023 Egypt Exploration Society and Holmes/Fish/Wallace. Cannot be reproduced here without license. The papyrus itself (a 2nd-3rd century artifact) is in the public domain.
completeness_note: Source text cannot be reproduced (copyrighted). The Basileian translation in the canon was made under fair-use research justification and is not redistributable as a parallel-text without separate licensing.

pericopes.title: Fasting from the kosmos / keeping the Sabbath
Adding a cubit to one's stature
